openssh.description: RegreSSHion: unauthenticated RCE in OpenSSH sshd via race condition on glibc-based Linux systems.
openssh.description_fr: RegreSSHion : RCE non authentifié dans sshd via condition de course sur Linux glibc.

apache.description: Apache HTTP Server 2.4.59 and earlier: improper escaping in mod_rewrite can map URLs to filesystem allowing code execution.
apache.description_fr: Apache 2.4.59 et antérieur : mod_rewrite permet l'exécution de code via URL mapping.

apache.description: Apache HTTP Server 2.4.55-2.4.58: HTTP/2 CONTINUATION flood DoS.

fortinet.description: FortiOS SSL-VPN out-of-bounds write allowing unauthenticated RCE. Actively exploited.
fortinet.description_fr: FortiOS SSL-VPN : écriture hors limites, RCE non authentifié, exploité activement.

fortinet.description: FortiOS authentication bypass via Node.js WebSocket module, granting super-admin privileges.
fortinet.description_fr: FortiOS : bypass d'authentification via WebSocket Node.js, droits super-admin.

paloalto.description: PAN-OS GlobalProtect command injection allowing unauthenticated RCE as root. Zero-day exploited in the wild.
paloalto.description_fr: PAN-OS GlobalProtect : injection de commandes non authentifiée, RCE root, zero-day exploité.

paloalto.description: PAN-OS authentication bypass in web management interface allowing unauthorized PHP script invocation.
paloalto.description_fr: PAN-OS : bypass d'authentification dans l'interface web (2025).

ivanti.description: Ivanti Connect Secure: stack-based buffer overflow allowing unauthenticated RCE. Exploited as zero-day.
ivanti.description_fr: Ivanti Connect Secure : débordement de pile, RCE non authentifié, zero-day exploité 2025.

ivanti.description: SSRF in Ivanti Connect Secure SAML component allowing access to restricted resources.
ivanti.description_fr: Ivanti Connect Secure : SSRF dans le composant SAML.

jenkins.description: Jenkins arbitrary file read via CLI args4j library. Enables reading /etc/passwd, SSH keys, secrets.key.
jenkins.description_fr: Jenkins CLI : lecture de fichiers arbitraires (clés SSH, secrets), CVE critique 2024.

teamcity.description: JetBrains TeamCity: authentication bypass + RCE. Widely exploited to create admin accounts and deploy malware.
teamcity.description_fr: TeamCity : bypass d'authentification + RCE, massivement exploité mars 2024.

citrix.description: Citrix Bleed: sensitive information disclosure leaking session tokens. Allows session hijacking without credentials.
citrix.description_fr: Citrix Bleed : fuite de tokens de session, prise de contrôle de sessions authentifiées.

activemq.description: Apache ActiveMQ OpenWire RCE via ClassPathXmlApplicationContext deserialization. Exploited to deploy ransomware.
activemq.description_fr: ActiveMQ OpenWire : désérialisation RCE, exploité pour déployer des ransomwares.

gitlab.description: GitLab SAML authentication bypass allowing account takeover of any user.
gitlab.description_fr: GitLab : bypass SAML permettant la prise de contrôle de n'importe quel compte.

confluence.description: Confluence Data Center: template injection allowing unauthenticated RCE (critical, released Jan 2024).
confluence.description_fr: Confluence : injection de template, RCE non authentifié (CVE critique janvier 2024).

exchange.description: Microsoft Exchange NTLM hash disclosure allowing relay attacks and privilege escalation.
exchange.description_fr: Exchange : divulgation et relais de hash NTLM, élévation de privilèges (2024).

php.description: PHP CGI on Windows: argument injection allowing unauthenticated RCE. Affects PHP 8.1/8.2/8.3 on Windows.
php.description_fr: PHP CGI Windows : injection d'arguments, RCE non authentifié (critique juin 2024).

tomcat.description: Apache Tomcat partial PUT enables file upload and RCE via default servlet interaction.
tomcat.description_fr: Apache Tomcat : partial PUT permettant upload de fichiers et RCE (2025).

grafana.description: Grafana 11.x SQL Expressions feature allows code execution, affecting all Grafana 11.0+ instances.
grafana.description_fr: Grafana 11.x : exécution de code via SQL Expressions (CVE critique 2024).

vmware.description: VMware Enhanced Authentication Plug-in: arbitrary Kerberos service ticket relay allowing Windows domain authentication abuse.
vmware.description_fr: VMware EAP : relais de tickets Kerberos arbitraires (2024).
